title: Senior Software Engineer - Rackspace India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Rackspace India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Rackspace India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rackspace India:
Rackspace India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rackspace India!
